features.name: Core API Setup
features.description: FastAPI entry point, database connection, basic health check

features.name: KPI Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/kpi/current, /api/v1/kpi/history, /api/v1/kpi/compare

features.name: Sales Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/sales/summary, /api/v1/sales/trends, /api/v1/sales/top-products, /api/v1/sales/regions

features.name: Orders Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/orders/status-summary, /api/v1/orders/list, /api/v1/orders/{id}

features.name: Quality Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/quality/summary, /api/v1/quality/defect-trends, /api/v1/quality/lots

features.name: Hourly Cron Synchronization
features.description: APScheduler job that syncs data from Gateway API every hour

features.name: Gateway Client Integration
features.description: httpx AsyncClient for calling external Gateway API with Bearer token auth

features.name: Product Reference Table
features.description: Product model and endpoints for managing product master data

features.name: Inventory Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/inventory/levels with product_name enrichment via JOIN

features.name: Database Migrations
features.description: Alembic setup with initial schema: KPI, Sales, Orders, Quality, Inventory tables

features.name: Swagger Documentation
features.description: Auto-generated API docs at /docs with all endpoints and schemas

features.name: Structured Logging
features.description: JSON structured logging with structlog, no print statements

features.name: Type Hints and mypy Checking
features.description: Full type coverage in all modules; mypy --strict passes
features.evidence: Started; some modules need type annotations

features.name: Unit and Integration Tests
features.description: pytest suite with >80% coverage for services and endpoints
features.evidence: Phase 1: 47 unit tests passing (100%), 13 KPI integration tests passing; 60 total tests; 49% coverage; router coverage improved to 96% for KPI

features.name: Docker Deployment
features.description: Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for local development and production

features.name: Environment Configuration
features.description: .env file with DATABASE_URL, GATEWAY_URL, GATEWAY_TOKEN, etc.
features.evidence: .env file exists with all required variables

features.name: Sensor Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/sensors/readings for IoT sensor data

features.name: Output/Report Endpoints
features.description: GET /api/v1/outputs for production output tracking

features.name: API Rate Limiting
features.description: Rate limit endpoints to prevent abuse (planned for v2)

features.name: Authentication (JWT)
features.description: JWT token validation for v2 API endpoints (planned)

features.name: Redis Caching Layer
features.description: Cache frequently-accessed data (KPI, top products) with Redis

features.name: Metrics Export (Prometheus)
features.description: Export application metrics for monitoring (planned)

notes: Core features (001-018) are complete. Type hints (013) and tests (014) in progress. Performance and auth features (019-022) planned for v2.
